pending.caption: KPI CY Less PY
pending.formula:

pending.caption: Min/Max Sales
pending.formula:
IF SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]) = WINDOW_MAX(SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]))
THEN SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921])
ELSEIF SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]) = WINDOW_MIN(SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921]))
THEN SUM([Calculation_721701895334993921])
END
